summary: Senior AWS Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise technology experience and strong hands-on background in ETL/ELT, SQL, Python, AWS Glue, S3, Redshift, Lambda-adjacent serverless patterns, and production data pipeline support. Experienced building and maintaining reliable data pipelines, validating data quality, optimizing SQL/reporting workloads, documenting technical processes, and supporting ticket-driven production environments. Strong fit for AWS ETL delivery, Glue-based data processing, SQL troubleshooting, stakeholder communication, and operational support. Currently expanding modern ELT/lakehouse tool fluency across Snowflake, dbt, Databricks, and related cloud data platform patterns; Matillion should be treated as adjacent/upskilling rather than deep production ownership.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Built and supported production ETL/reporting pipelines using Python, Pandas, SQL, and AWS-oriented data platform patterns to ingest telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints and transform it into trusted analytics and forecasting datasets.

Designed AWS data platform components using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue for ETL, Amazon Redshift for analytics/forecasting workloads, and EC2/ECS-based Python processing for scalable data pipeline execution.

Developed and optimized SQL-backed reporting structures for historical retention, operational analytics, and capacity forecasting, applying validation checks and reconciliation to improve dataset trust.
Integrated BMC TrueSight/TSCO, CA APM, and AppDynamics feeds into unified reporting pipelines, supporting data quality, source alignment, and root-cause investigation for data/interface issues.
Created repeatable pipeline processes that reduced manual data preparation, improved reliability, and supported executive-level reporting in a regulated financial-services environment.

Supported production troubleshooting, incident-style investigation, operational documentation, and stakeholder communication across pipeline outputs, dashboards, and source-system data quality issues.
Worked in ticket-driven enterprise environments with Agile/Kanban practices, coordinating with technical and business teams to prioritize requests, resolve issues, and communicate delivery status.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Converted Dynatrace AppMon/Synthetics and Gomez performance telemetry into analytics-ready datasets and reports used by engineering teams to improve digital-system performance.
Led the FAST project, mining real-user and synthetic monitoring data to identify optimization opportunities for revenue-critical web and mobile platforms.
Participated in AWS migration planning by providing observability, performance, and operational-readiness input for cloud transition decisions.
Documented monitoring, data interpretation, and operational procedures for technical teams and stakeholders.

experience.title: SME for CA APM / Senior Consultant
bullets: Built Perl and Korn Shell extraction scripts to automate performance reporting and replace manual weekly exports with repeatable data processing routines.
Worked with Oracle, SQL, WebLogic, WebSphere, Linux/Unix, and J2EE teams to troubleshoot production issues and document root-cause findings from enterprise monitoring data.
Designed dashboards, alerts, thresholds, and reporting structures used by operations teams to support service reliability and issue resolution.
Produced technical documentation and knowledge-transfer materials adopted by client operations and engineering teams.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster while maintaining data correctness and performance.
Built C++/OCCI/OCI and SQL validation routines to verify migration accuracy across high-volume transactional datasets.
Optimized database access patterns and transaction logic, reducing hardware footprint while preserving mission-critical throughput.
Supported phased migration cutover, source-to-target validation, and production-readiness testing for a major platform modernization effort.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform on AWS
projects.description: Designed a serverless AWS data platform pattern using S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, PySpark, and Parquet to support scalable analytics and AI data access workloads.

projects.name: Enterprise Telemetry ETL and Forecasting Platform
projects.description: Built repeatable ETL/reporting workflows that ingested infrastructure telemetry and produced trusted forecasting, dashboard, and executive reporting datasets.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an automated pipeline using Python, semantic duplicate detection, LLM scoring, JSON quality gates, and local render/tracking workflows.
